ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample being rated */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taster who rated the wine */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score assigned to the wine sample (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Notes from tastings or reviews */,
  "rating_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the quality rating */,
  "rating_method" TEXT /* Method used for rating (e.g., blind, open) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality rating was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_ratings_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production staff, quality assurance) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object with user permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample produced */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the batch */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment used for production */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch was produced */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity produced in liters */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the production process */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Status of quality control (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine production region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the region */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the region in meters */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the region in wine production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grape_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grape variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the grape variety */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the grape is grown */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the grape */,
  "yield" INTEGER /* Average yield of the grape variety */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Resistance to diseases */,
  "maturity_period" INTEGER /* Maturity period of the grape in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grape_varieties_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_varieties" (
  "wine_variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine-variety relationship */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grape variety used */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the grape variety in the wine blend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_varieties_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES grape_varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
